title: The Third Lover
writer: Claude Chabrol, Martial Matthieu, Paul Gégauff
actors: Jacques Charrier, Stéphane Audran, Walther Reyer
plot: André Mercier, a journalist known as Albin Mercier, is a failed, embittered writer. Sent to cover an event in Germany, he gets to know Andreas Hartmann, another writer who, for his part, has not... failed. The successful Andreas i...
